functions.name: calculate_final_reserve_fuel
functions.bug_description: Reserve durations swapped: jet assigned 45 minutes, piston assigned 30 minutes. Correct values are jet 30 minutes, piston 45 minutes.

functions.name: get_gas_day
functions.bug_description: Gas day starts at midnight instead of 09:00 Central Time as required by NAESB WGQ 1.3.2 / FERC Order 698.

functions.name: validate_diagnosis_sequence
functions.bug_description: Allows V00-Y99 external cause codes as principal diagnosis. ICD-10-CM Guidelines Section I.C.20.a prohibits external cause codes from being the principal diagnosis.

functions.name: validate_imo_number
functions.bug_description: Check digit uses ascending weights 2-7 instead of descending weights 7-2 as specified by IMO Resolution A.1079(28).

functions.name: electricity_cost
functions.bug_description: Applies flat rate of the tier the total consumption falls into instead of progressive application across tiers (first N kWh at tier 1 rate, next M kWh at tier 2 rate, etc.).
